meta.tagline: The witch factor in you is still asleep.
meta.descLanding: An examination for the witch factor. See which witch you would become, were you sent to the island.
meta.descCard: A Witch Factor Examination record — magic detected: {magic}.
meta.descShare: Magic detected: {magic}. Take the examination and see which witch is found in you.

landing.title: Witch Factor Examination
landing.hook: The witch factor in you is still asleep.
landing.ctaAside: Adapts to you — usually 20 to 40 questions.

footer.disclaimer: This site is a non-commercial fan work based on 魔法少女ノ魔女裁判 (Magical Girl · Witch Trial), unaffiliated with the original and its rights holders.
footer.v1Label: The personality test from the same author

gate.title: Consent to Examination
gate.fan: This examination is a non-commercial fan project based on 魔法少女ノ魔女裁判, unaffiliated with the original work and its rights holders.
gate.age: This examination is intended for individuals 18 years and older and contains mature content that may not be suitable for all audiences, including: violence; blood; death; corpses; killing; depictions of execution, self-harm and suicide; and fear and psychological horror, presented as text, with no graphic imagery. If any of these topics may distress you, please do not proceed.
gate.content: If you are in a fragile place right now, go gently — you can stop at any time.
gate.crisisIntro: If you are struggling with thoughts of hurting yourself, please reach a crisis line first:
gate.storage: Your answers stay in this browser, on this device. Nothing is uploaded or collected.
gate.fictional: “Witch” and “Witch Trial” are fictional elements of the original work, not a reference to any real person or group.

inconclusive.title: No matching record
inconclusive.body: No record matches you yet. Please take the examination again.

verdict.sentence: You are taken to the prison.

feedback.invite: Suggestions to improve your result? We'd love to hear them.
feedback.debugAnswersNote: The line below lets us replay exactly how your answers routed. If you'd rather not share your answers, delete it.

result.safety: If any of this has distressed you, please reach out to a crisis line below.

collection.title: Magic Archive
collection.intro: Every magic your examinations have turned up is kept here.
collection.collectorNote: The full figure-book of all {total} opens to you.
collection.empty: The archive is empty. Take the examination to detect your magic.
collection.metaDesc: The archive of magic you have been examined as.

errors.archive: The archive did not answer. Try again.

notFound.title: No such page in the archive.
